EquipDB.name: EquipDB
EquipDB.description: Master equipment and item definitions. Contains all game items, equipment sets, and their properties.

SkillDB.name: SkillDB
SkillDB.description: Complete skill and ability definitions. Contains active skills, passives, ultimates, and talent tree nodes.

HeroStatDB.name: HeroStatDB
HeroStatDB.description: Hero stat blocks with base stats, growth rates, and attribute scaling per hero level.

HeroRosterDB.name: HeroRosterDB
HeroRosterDB.description: Hero registry with class/faction assignments, evolution paths, and basic attributes.

StageDB.name: StageDB
StageDB.description: Campaign stage, mission, and level definitions including enemy spawns and rewards.

MonsterDB.name: MonsterDB
MonsterDB.description: Monster and NPC definitions including enemy stats, AI behavior, and spawn groups.

AnimDB.name: AnimDB
AnimDB.description: Animation, visual effect, and skeletal mesh references for heroes and monsters.

MasterDB.name: MasterDB
MasterDB.description: Central entity registry. Maps every game object to its attributes across all other databases in the cluster.

ConfigDB.name: ConfigDB
ConfigDB.description: Game system configuration parameters, constants, and global settings.

AchieveDB.name: AchieveDB
AchieveDB.description: Achievement definitions, progress tracking, and reward configuration.
